base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of subweapon_cross_boomerang — a projectile from 1986 castlevania. Cross/Boomerang — flies forward + returns in boomerang arc. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Cross/Boomerang — flies forward + returns in boomerang arc; 4-frame spin animation. Holy weapon extra-damage vs undead. Heart cost 1
